member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData
member.summary: Wrapper for all data for a specific cardinal axis (x or y).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis,System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Intended to group all unique axis information used during execution and printing.
member.param: friendly name used during datalog prints for axis.
Scalar used when printing axis values.
Points to be executed on axis.
string Points to be executed on axis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.Axis
member.summary: Gets or sets Shmoo Axis for points to run over.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.DatalogName
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of axis used during datalog prints.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.DatalogScalar
member.summary: Gets or sets Scalar used during datalog prints to apply to axis values.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.Points
member.summary: Gets or sets List of points as strings to run over shmoo axis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.First
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of axis used during datalog prints.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.Last
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of axis used during datalog prints.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.Resolution
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of axis used during datalog prints.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.GetPrefixValue(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog)
member.summary: Gets value for prefix string.
member.returns: multiplier to be used to scale based on units.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData.GetResolution(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.Double})
member.summary: Returns resolution of shmoo point list.
member.param: list of shmoo points being run.
member.returns: Resolution based on spacing between points.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.GetXAxisPoints(System.String)
member.summary: Method to be implemented by user to return all the points in the x-axis range that TestMethod should iterate over.
member.param: string from test method parameter "XAxisRange". It usually contains the needed information so user can generate the list of double points for this axis. User is responsible for string format.
member.returns: List of double points values for x-axis to iterate over.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.GetYAxisPoints(System.String)
member.summary: Method to be implemented by user to return all the points in the y-axis range that TestMethod should iterate over.
member.param: string from test method parameter "YAxisRange". It usually contains the needed information so user can generate the list of double points for this axis. User is responsible for string format.
member.returns: List of double points values for y-axis to iterate over.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.GetFunctionalTest(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Extension to allow modification of plist execution settings, for example set capture pins or disable incremental mode (starting from last failing pattern).
member.param: The plist name to build the IFunctionalTest.
The levels test condition name to build the IFunctionalTest.
The timings test condition name to build the IFunctionalTest.
member.returns: The IFunctionalTest object build as per user requirements.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.PrePointExecute(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Extension to allow user to run custom code prior to plist execution on a specific shmoo point.
member.param: The shmoo point to apply the custom code to.
Functional test object that contains execution data for the plist.
member.returns: true if the custom code was successfully applied and the shmoo point is relevant for the test; otherwise, false if the shmoo point should be skipped.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.PostPointExecute(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Extension to allow user to run custom code after plist execution on a specific shmoo point.
member.param: The shmoo point to apply the custom code to.
Functional test object that contains execution data for the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.PointExecute(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Extension to allow user to override the code that runs on a specific shmoo point. By default, the provided plist will be executed.
member.param: The shmoo point to apply the custom code to.
The object for holding the exit port, and the normal/regional functional results.
member.returns: true if the shmoo point has passed; otherwise, false if the shmoo point has failed.
member.remarks: The return value of this function will impact the exit port of the instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.PostExecute(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults)
member.summary: Extension to allow user to run custom code after all shmoo points have been executed, and determines the final exit port.
member.param: Functional test object that contains execution data for the plist.
The object for holding the exit port, and the normal/regional functional results.
member.remarks: By default, if at least one Shmoo point fails, the instance will exit from port 0. Otherwise, the instance will exit from port 1.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.PreExecute(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Extension to allow user to run custom code before any shmoo points are executed.
member.param: Functional test object that contains execution data for the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.CreateTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Called prior to any test in Execute to generate the test instance results object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooExtensions.GetDynamicPinMask
member.summary: Gets the list of pins to mask execution after execution. The test method will merge this list with the ones from the test instance parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend
member.summary: This class will manage shmoo plot legend characters.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.ReservedSymbols
member.summary: Reserved symbols.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.ReservedSymbols.PASS
member.summary: pass.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.ReservedSymbols.SKIP
member.summary: skip.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.ReservedSymbols.EXCESSIVE_FAIL
member.summary: excessive fail. This should be used when no more characters left to be used.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.AddData(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new fail info and returns the assigned character for it. Note: method will take care of the duplicated fail info.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.AddData(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Adds a new per pin fail info and returns the assigned character for it. Note: method will take care of the duplicated fail info.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.FlagSkippedPoint(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint)
member.summary: Flag a point as skipped. There's a reserved symbol for skipped point.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.GetPointSymbol(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String)
member.summary: This should return symbol for the given point. If this point doesn't have entry, we assume it's passing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.GetPlotLegend
member.summary: Returns the plot legend mapping from key to value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegend.ResetLegend
member.summary: Resets data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase
member.summary: This defines the base class for plot legend.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.PinNameToPointToSymbolMap
member.summary: Gets or sets PinNameToPointToSymbolMap.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.PointToSymbolMap
member.summary: Gets or sets pointToSymbolMap. This map holds the shmoo map that will be printed to ituff/console. This will hold the symbol per point. (not the legend. The legend has a separate class).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.GetPointSymbol(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String)
member.summary: This should return symbol for the given point.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.GetPlotLegend
member.summary: This should return the plot legend data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.ResetLegend
member.summary: Resets legend data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Used to loop over legend map.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.Reset
member.summary: Resets data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.SetPointSymbol(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String)
member.summary: Sets symbol. It can be used only be inheriting classes.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase.SetPinNameToPointSymbol(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets symbol. It can be used only be inheriting classes.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendCustom
member.summary: This class represents custom plot legend. User of Shmoo test method, can decide to use 'CUSTOM' plot mode through the parameter. In this custom mode, user will have control over the symbol to write for each shmoo point, and over the legend keys and values. Note that in custom mode, there's no direct connection between symbol and legend key; unlike the default plotting mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendCustom.AddData(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary:
Populates the shmoo map with the following information per a given point: [1] symbol: the symbol of this point to show when plotting the map to ituff/console. [2] legend data: the key and values to show when printing the legend following the plotting map. Note: from user's perspective, there's no restriction or any connection between key and symbol. but at the end, the final legend key will appear on ituff/console as follow:
E.g. point=(4, 7); legendKeyAndValue=(keys: MySpecialPoint, HelloABC | values=FailInfo1, FailInfo2)
plotting:
2_tname_INSTANCE_NAME^LEGEND^[4,7,MySpecialPoint] 2_strgval_fail_FailInfo1 2_tname_INSTANCE_NAME^LEGEND^[4,7,HelloABC] 2_strgval_fail_FailInfo2.
member.param: symbol for this point, when printing the shmoo map.
legend info to add. See example.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendCustom.GetPlotLegend
member.summary: Returns the plot legend mapping from key to value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendCustom.GetPointSymbol(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String)
member.summary: This should return symbol for the given point. If this point doesn't have entry, we throw an exception; since in custom plot legend mode, user need to fill the symbol for each possible point.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendCustom.ResetLegend
member.summary: Resets legend data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendCustom.GenerateKey(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPoint,System.String)
member.summary: This function should be used (internally by Prime developers) to create the key for the legend.
member.returns: the final key to be used with the shmoo legend.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for executing Shmoo.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExecMode
member.summary: Enum for Execution Mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExecMode.AllPin
member.summary: All Pin Mode, which is the default execution mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExecMode.PerPin
member.summary: Per Pin mode.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType
member.summary: Enum for X/Y IShmooAxis Type parameters.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.None
member.summary: ShmooAxis is unused.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.LevelsTestCondition
member.summary: ShmooAxis is a Prime LevelsTestCondition type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.TimingTestCondition
member.summary: ShmooAxis is a Prime TimingTestCondition type.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.PatConfig
member.summary: ShmooAxis is a list of Prime PatConfigs.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.PatConfigSetPoint
member.summary: ShmooAxis is a list of Prime PatConfigSetPoints.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.VoltageConfig
member.summary: ShmooAxis is a voltage configuration (fivr/dlvr).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType.UserDefined
member.summary: ShmooAxis is user defined. By default shmoo execution functions will do nothing. Functions can be overwritten using extensions.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog
member.summary: Scale for a given axis.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog.Base
member.summary: Axis should be printed to datalog in base units.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog.Milli
member.summary: Axis should be printed to datalog in milli units.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog.Micro
member.summary: Axis should be printed to datalog in micro units.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.UnitPrefixForDatalog.Nano
member.summary: Axis should be printed to datalog in nano units.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPrintFormat
member.summary: Enum for format to print to ituff.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPrintFormat.ShmooHub
member.summary: Shmoohub print in format.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPrintFormat.ECADS
member.summary: ECADS print in format.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPrintFormat.ARIES
member.summary: ARIES print in format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PowerDownBetweenPointsSettings
member.summary: Settings to enable or disable PowerDownBetweenPoints.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PowerDownBetweenPointsSettings.ENABLED
member.summary: Enable power down between points.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PowerDownBetweenPointsSettings.DISABLED
member.summary: Disable power down between points.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPlotMode
member.summary: Shmoo plot mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPlotMode.NORMAL
member.summary: Normal mode where symbol and key in the plot is automatically chosen, but user control the legend fail string.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPlotMode.CUSTOM
member.summary: Custom mode where user control all the plot attributes, symbol key and legend fail string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisParam
member.summary: Gets or sets the XAxisParameter.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisParamType
member.summary: Gets or sets the XAxisParamType.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the ExecutionMode. None by AllPin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated shmoo pins for PerPin mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisDatalogPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit prefix for scaling the X axis. (Base, Milli, Micro, Nano).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisDatalogName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name used during datalog prints for X axis. Uses XAxisParam by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisRange
member.summary: Gets or sets the XAxisRange. Default format: "Start: Resolution: NumberOfPoints".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisParam
member.summary: Gets or sets the YAxisParameter. Empty by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisParamType
member.summary: Gets or sets the YAxisParamType. None by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisRange
member.summary: Gets or sets the YAxisRange. Default format: "Start: Resolution: NumberOfPoints".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisDatalogPrefix
member.summary: Gets or sets the unit prefix for scaling the Y axis. (Base, Milli, Micro, Nano).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisDatalogName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name used during datalog prints for Y Axis. Uses YAxisParam by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.RegionalKillLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets the RegionalKillLimits. Format is: "XMin, XMax, YMin, YMax".

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PrintFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the print format for shmoo ituffs.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PowerDownBetweenPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets power_down_between_point. This will trigger EndSequence before ApplyTestCondition in PrePointExecute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PlotMode
member.summary: Gets or sets PlotMode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.PlotLegend
member.summary: Gets or sets the PlotLegend.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooLoopPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets all shmoo points arranged in one list. At execute we iterate over this list to create shmoo.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisData
member.summary: Gets or sets data for x axis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisData
member.summary: Gets or sets data for y axis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.Printer
member.summary: Gets or sets Shmoo Printer.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.RegionalKillLimitsStructure
member.summary: Gets or sets regional kill limits.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisStringPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets the X axis points as string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisStringPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets the Y axis points as string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.YAxisPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets the Y axis points.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.XAxisPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets the X axis points.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.GetPlotLegend
member.summary: Returns normal plot legend.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.GetCustomPlotLegend
member.summary: Returns custom plot legend.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.GetShmooAxis(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ShmooAxisType)
member.summary: Gets a shmoo axis using the default type enum ShmooAxisType.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.SetPinMask
member.summary: Set the list of pins that will be masked when plist is executed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.SetupPlotLegend
member.summary: function to set plot legend based on the parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExtractedRangeFields
member.summary: ExtractedRangedFields.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExtractedRangeFields.Start
member.summary: Gets or sets Start.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExtractedRangeFields.NumberOfPoints
member.summary: Gets or sets NumberOfPoints.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.ExtractedRangeFields.Resolution
member.summary: Gets or sets Resolution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.KillLimits
member.summary: RegionalKillLimits.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.KillLimits.AreLimitsUsed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether limits are used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.KillLimits.XMin
member.summary: Gets or sets XMin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.KillLimits.XMax
member.summary: Gets or sets XMax.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.KillLimits.YMin
member.summary: Gets or sets YMin.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PrimeShmooTestMethod.KillLimits.YMax
member.summary: Gets or sets YMax.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.EmptyShmooAxis
member.summary: EmptyShmooAxis axis used when no parameter is provided.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.EmptyShmooAxis.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis
member.summary: ShmooAxis class is used to determine what actions are taken during execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.OriginalValue
member.summary: Gets original value for the axis parameter as a string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.AxisInput
member.summary: Gets the name of the thing the axis is iterating over.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.Units
member.summary: Gets name of the base units for the axis.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets sessionContext passed in through test method used for prints.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.PrePointExecute(System.String,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Runs before each point is executed. Sets the TC spec value of X and Y if they are defined.
member.returns: false if this point should be skipped, true otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.PostExecute
member.summary: Runs after execute for cleanup/print functions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.IShmooAxis.PreExecute
member.summary: Runs before all shmoo points have been executed.
member.returns: True if successfully executed, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PatConfigAxis
member.summary: PatConfigAxis version of axis.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PatConfigAxis.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PatConfigSetPointAxis
member.summary: PatConfigSetPointAxis axis.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PatConfigSetPointAxis.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.LevelAxis
member.summary: LevelsTestCondition version of axis.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.LevelAxis.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: name of parameter that axis is made of.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.TestConditionAxis
member.summary: TestConditionAxis version of axis.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.TestConditionAxis.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: name of specset that axis is made of.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.TestConditionAxis.ApplyTestCondition(Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalTest)
member.summary: Applies test condition if the axis value has changed.
member.param: functional test to apply test condition onto.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.TimingAxis
member.summary: TimingTestCondition version of axis.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.TimingAxis.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: name of parameter that axis is made of.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.UserDefinedAxis
member.summary: UserDefinedAxis. Users are expected to populate each extension.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: name of object that axis is made of.

member.summary: VoltageConfigurationAxis version of axis.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Configurations for the voltage config axis.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.VoltageConfigurations.VoltageConfigurationAxis.GetVoltageOverrides(System.String)
member.summary: Gets voltage overrides from VoltageConverterOptions.
member.returns: Voltage overrides values in dictionary format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.VoltageConfigurations.VoltageConfigurationOptions
member.summary: Defines options used by voltage configurations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.VoltageConfigurations.VoltageConfigurationOptions.FivrCondition
member.summary: Gets or sets the fivr condition name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.VoltageConfigurations.VoltageConfigurationOptions.Overrides
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of overrides using specific syntax.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.VoltageConfigurations.VoltageConfigurationOptions.DlvrPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of dlvr pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.VoltageConfigurations.VoltageConfigurationOptions.Domains
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of domains.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooConstants
member.summary: Constants used by the entire shmoo test method.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooConstants.DoubleTolerance
member.summary: Tolerance used during floating point arithmetic to prevent floating point issues. formatter goes out to 12 digits to support up to 0.01 ns increments.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooConstants.DecimalPlaces
member.summary: Number of decimals to go out to for tolerance.

member.summary: ShmooPoint.

member.summary: Gets YValue.

member.summary: Equals.

member.summary: this.

member.summary: Print class for ecads format.

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
Name of current test instance to be used during print. /// Lists of shmoo pins. This session context.

member.summary: Print class for ShmooHub.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPrinter
member.summary: Base class used for ituff prints.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPrinter.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPrinter.GetFailString(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Returns failure data string ot be used by Plot legend.
member.param: list of failures for functional test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPrinter.GetPerPinFailString(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.FunctionalService.IFailureData})
member.summary: Returns per pin failure data string ot be used by Plot legend.
member.param: list of failures for functional test.
member.returns: Dictionary of pin name with formatted fail string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPrinter.PrintPlotToItuff(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.PlotLegendBase,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData)
member.summary: Prints plot to ituff. Prints to console at the same time.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooPrinter.PrintSSTP(Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData,Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.AxisData)
member.summary: Generates SSTP summary for shmoo plot print. prints in the format: 2_strgval_X_{originalXValue}_Y_4{originalYValue} Used by Aries and ShmooHub formats.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults
member.summary: Class to allow proper user modification of exit port.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults.FunctionalResults
member.summary: Gets or sets collection of functional result per point.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults.IsAllPassing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether all points are passing. True by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults.IsAllFailures
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether all points are failing. True by default.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Shmoo.ShmooTestInstanceResults.IsRegionPassing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether all points in the regional kill area are passing. True by default.
